plugins.name: Adversea
plugins.description: Full Adversea integration covering all documented screening, entity recognition, and account endpoints.

entrypoints.name: PEP & Sanctions Check
entrypoints.description: Checks PEP exposure and active sanctions datasets for the target name.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Topic Report
entrypoints.description: Adverse media analysis grouped by risk topics.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated text output.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Social Media
entrypoints.description: Finds public social media profiles matching the target name.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Unit Analysis
entrypoints.description: Analyzes search engine results for each URL. Mode text returns concise text; mode claims returns atomic facts.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of the screened person or company.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.title: Mode
inputs.description: text = concise analysis per URL; claims = atomic facts per URL.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated text.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

inputs.name: media_only
inputs.title: Media Only
inputs.description: Restrict analysis to internet media.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: RPO Organization Search (Slovakia only)
entrypoints.description: Finds Slovak organizations in RPO/ORSR registry. Automatically fetches business subjects for each found organization. Slovakia only.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company to search in RPO.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Debtors Check (Slovakia only)
entrypoints.description: Checks publicly available debtor registries (health insurance, tax authority, etc.) for the target. Slovakia only.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company to screen in debtor lists.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Default Entity Recognition
entrypoints.description: Extracts related entities (people, companies) from search results for the target name. Useful for discovering connections.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company for entity extraction.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated output.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

plugins.name: OpenCorporates by OpenRiskPlatform
plugins.description: Searches companies and officers in OpenCorporates and returns normalized OpenRisk entities.

entrypoints.name: Company Search
entrypoints.description: Searches OpenCorporates companies and returns organization entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text company or officer name to search in OpenCorporates.

inputs.name: jurisdiction_code
inputs.title: Jurisdiction Code
inputs.description: Optional OpenCorporates jurisdiction code such as gb, us_de, or sk.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.title: Result Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of results to request per search.

inputs.name: inactive
inputs.title: Inactive Filter
inputs.description: If true, only inactive records are returned. If false, inactive records are excluded. If omitted, OpenCorporates default behavior is used.

entrypoints.name: Officer Search
entrypoints.description: Searches OpenCorporates officers and returns person entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text company or officer name to search in OpenCorporates.

inputs.name: jurisdiction_code
inputs.title: Jurisdiction Code
inputs.description: Optional OpenCorporates jurisdiction code such as gb, us_de, or sk.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.title: Result Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of results to request per search.

inputs.name: inactive
inputs.title: Inactive Filter
inputs.description: If true, only inactive records are returned. If false, inactive records are excluded. If omitted, OpenCorporates default behavior is used.

plugins.name: OpenSanctions by OpenRiskPlatform
plugins.description: Matches a person name against OpenSanctions and returns normalized person entities.

entrypoints.name: Match Persons
entrypoints.description: Matches a person name against OpenSanctions and returns normalized person entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text person name to match against OpenSanctions.
